summary: Cluster is over-broad and splits into several live non-duplicate subfamilies. No close, merge, or new fix PR is safe from this pass: each open seed issue already has a hydrated linked PR or needs maintainer/product review, and require_fix_before_close blocks issue closeout until a fix lands. Security-sensitive linked PR #92726 is quarantined only for central security handling.
